gcp.datacatalog.projects.locations.taxon.description: Deletes a taxonomy, including all policy tags in this taxonomy, their associated policies, and the policy tags references from BigQuery columns.

required.description: Required. Resource name of the taxonomy to delete. Note: All policy tags in this taxonomy are also deleted.
